chunks.title: Elisha's Oracle and Skeptical Officer
chunks.reason: Contains the prophet's prediction of abundance and the royal officer's skeptical response.

chunks.title: The Lepers Discover the Empty Camp
chunks.reason: Narrates the lepers' decision to visit the Aramean camp and their discovery of its abandonment.

chunks.title: The News Spreads and the Plunder Begins
chunks.reason: Describes the lepers reporting to the gatekeepers, the king's investigation, and the people plundering the camp.

chunks.title: Fulfillment of the Oracle
chunks.reason: Details the death of the skeptical officer at the gate as foretold by Elisha.
